name: I-Oxytocin
description: I-Endogenous peptide hormone. I-uterotonic yomugqa wokuqala wokuvimbela nokwelashwa kwe-postpartum hemorrhage (PPH). Ibangela ukufinyela kwesibeletho futhi kunciphisa ukulahlekelwa igazi ngemva kokubeletha. Inikezwa NGEMVA kokulethwa kwe-placenta.
indications: Ukuvimbela ukopha kwangemva kokubeletha (isimiso ngemva kokubeletha)
dose: Ukuvimbela i-PPH: amayunithi angu-10 e-IM ngokushesha ngemva kokulethwa kwe-placenta (umzila wensimu okhethwayo). Ukwelashwa kwe-PPH: amayunithi angu-10-40 ku-1L IV, faka ku-40-80 mU/min. Uma IV ingatholakali: 10 amayunithi IM.
window: Nikeza NGEMVA kokubeletha kwe-placenta -- ukunikeza ngaphambi kokubeletha kungabamba i-placenta.
warnings: ZINIKEZA NGEMVA KOKULETHWA KWE-PLACENTA -- ukubamba i-placenta kuyinkimbinkimbi esongela ukuphila.
I-IV bolus ingabangela i-hypotension eqinile kanye ne-cardiac arrhythmia -- njalo ihlanjululwe futhi ifake kancane.
Umphumela we-antidiuretic ngamavolumu amakhulu - qapha i-hyponatremia.

obstetric.note: I-uterotonic eyinhloko. Uma i-atony yesibeletho ingaphenduli, cabanga nge-misoprostol, i-tranexamic acid (TXA), ukucindezela kwesibeletho se-bimanual, kanye ne-MEDEVAC esheshayo.

source: JTS CPG: Obstetric Emergencies / WHO PPH Guidelines
